'''kadufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thalassian|thalassian]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-d-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thalassian|thalassian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kadufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kædifith|kædifith]] || [[word:kædifij|kædifij]] || [[word:kædifish|kædifish]] || [[word:kædifi|kædifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kadudufuth|kadudufuth]] || [[word:kadudufuj|kadudufuj]] || [[word:kadudufush|kadudufush]] || [[word:kadudufu|kadudufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kadufuth|kadufuth]] || [[word:kadufuj|kadufuj]] || [[word:kadufush|kadufush]] || [[word:kadufu|kadufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kaduffuth|kaduffuth]] || [[word:kaduffuj|kaduffuj]] || [[word:kaduffush|kaduffush]] || [[word:kaduffuf|kaduffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kadufuthu|kadufuthu]] || [[word:kadufuju|kadufuju]] || [[word:kadufushu|kadufushu]] || [[word:kadufuku|kadufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kadufuth|kadufuth]] || [[word:kadufuj|kadufuj]] || [[word:kadufush|kadufush]] || [[word:kadufu|kadufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kadufuthul|kadufuthul]] || [[word:kadufujul|kadufujul]] || [[word:kadufushul|kadufushul]] || [[word:kadufukul|kadufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kadufuthuthu|kadufuthuthu]] || [[word:kadufujuju|kadufujuju]] || [[word:kadufushushu|kadufushushu]] || [[word:kadufuku|kadufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kadufuthun|kadufuthun]] || [[word:kadufujun|kadufujun]] || [[word:kadufushun|kadufushun]] || [[word:kadufukun|kadufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kadufuthuoro|kadufuthuoro]] || [[word:kadufujuoro|kadufujuoro]] || [[word:kadufushuoro|kadufushuoro]] || [[word:kadufukuoro|kadufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
